title: selliguea albara
intro: Selliguea albara, also known as the Polynesian polypody, is a species of fern in the family Polypodiaceae. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to treat various health conditions due to its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Selliguea albara include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and supporting immune function. In herbal preparations, Selliguea albara is often used as a tea or tincture, and it is also used in traditional medicine in some Pacific Island cultures.
